title: ononis fruticosa subvar. intermedia
intro: Ononis fruticosa subvar. intermedia, also known as Spurred Medick, is a plant species within the legume family Fabaceae, characterized by its yellow flowers and climbing habit. The medicinal properties of Ononis fruticosa subvar. intermedia lie in its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ononis fruticosa subvar. intermedia include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health applications.
